deltas.releaseNoteText: - `webhook` | Schema-accepted for forward-compatibility; runtime handler is deferred in v1. | N/A | (row removed from node type table in overview.mdx; new table lists only `agent` and `human`)
deltas.targetSection: Node types table (webhook row) and checklist item referencing webhook node type
deltas.summary: The `webhook` node type has been removed from the documented node type table; the overview now lists only `agent` and `human` nodes. Two references must be removed: the webhook row in the node types table (around line 24) and the checklist item on line 175 that lists `webhook` as a valid node type.
